originalTitle: I review robot vacuums for a living, ask me anything!
summary: Welcome! I'm The Verge's smart home reviewer, and I'm hosting an exclusive subscriber AMA today at 10 AM PT / 1 PM ET. I test a lot of connected gadgets for my job, but the dominant device in my home - by both number and square footage covered - is the robot vacuum. At any […]
content: Welcome! I’m The Verge’s smart home reviewer, and I’m hosting an exclusive subscriber AMA today at 10 AM PT / 1 PM ET. I test a lot of connected gadgets for my job, but the dominant device in my home — by both number and square footage covered — is the robot vacuum. At any given time, I have a dozen of these bots bouncing around, sweeping and mopping my floors and irritating my cats.  I just published a guide on how to choose the best robot vacuum for your home, and I recently reviewed the Dyson Spot & Scrub, Shark’s Power Detect, and the Matic, which is the most interesting new approach to a robot vacuum I’ve seen in my 7 years of reviewing these machines. From vacuums with arms and ones that can climb stairs to basic bump-and-roll bots, there’s a dizzying array of robovacs on the market. I’m here to help you cut through the marketing hype (no, suction power isn’t the most important spec; yes, robot mops are better now, but they’re still not great) and pick a robot that will clean your floors without driving you crazy.  [Media: https://www.instagram.com/reels/DTLUXhZDiyT/] I’ve also been closely covering the business side of the robot vacuum world and can answer your questions about who bought iRobot, what the heck is up with Dreame, when robot vacuums will climb stairs, and why Dyson put somebody else’s motor in its latest vacuum.  So, if you have questions, concerns, or just big thoughts, post them in the comment section here. I’ll start replying at 1 PM ET today and will hang around until 2 PM. Come join me to talk about the robot revolution. It starts small.
chineseTitle: 我以审查机器人吸尘器为生，有什么问题都可以问我！
chineseSummary: 欢迎！我是 The Verge 的智能家居评论员，今天上午 10 点（太平洋时间）/下午 1 点（东部时间）举办独家订户 AMA。我为工作测试了很多联网设备，但我家里的主要设备（无论是数量还是占地面积）是机器人真空吸尘器。在任何[...]
chineseContent: 欢迎！我是 The Verge 的智能家居评论员，今天上午 10 点（太平洋时间）/下午 1 点（东部时间）举办独家订户 AMA。我为工作测试了很多联网设备，但我家中最主要的设备（无论是数量还是占地面积）都是扫地机器人。在任何特定时间，我都有十几个这样的机器人在我周围跳来跳去，扫地、拖地并激怒我的猫。  我刚刚发布了一份关于如何为您的家庭选择最好的机器人真空吸尘器的指南，最近我回顾了 Dyson Spot & Scrub、Shark’s Power Detect 和 Matic，这是我在 7 年的评论这些机器中看到的最有趣的机器人真空吸尘器新方法。从带手臂的吸尘器和可以爬楼梯的吸尘器，到基本的碰撞机器人，市场上有一系列令人眼花缭乱的机器人吸尘器。我来这里是为了帮助您消除营销炒作（不，吸力不是最重要的规格；是的，机器人拖把现在更好，但它们仍然不是很好）并选择一个可以清洁您的地板而又不会让您发疯的机器人。  [媒体：https://www.instagram.com/reels/DTLUXhZDiyT/]我也一直在密切关注机器人吸尘器世界的商业方面，并且可以回答您的问题：谁购买了 iRobot、Dreame 到底是怎么回事、机器人吸尘器什么时候会爬楼梯、以及为什么戴森将别人的电机放在最新的吸尘器中。  因此，如果您有疑问、疑虑或只是有重大想法，请将其发布在此处的评论部分。我将于美国东部时间今天下午 1 点开始回复，并会一直等到下午 2 点。快来和我一起谈论机器人革命吧。从小事开始。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
